_comment: Food label assignments and junk food configuration.
_instructions: Copy this file to userdata/food_labels.json and edit to match your Mealie instance.
food_labels: maps food name (as it appears in Mealie) to a Mealie label name.
Label names must exist in Mealie (Shopping → Labels) — they are NOT auto-created.
Matching is case-insensitive as a fallback but exact case is preferred.
junk_food_ids: list of Mealie food UUIDs to delete (blank entries, header rows etc).
Find UUIDs via Mealie's API: GET /api/foods
junk_food_patterns: regex patterns — any food name matching these will be deleted.
Default patterns catch blank entries and --- section headers ---.
